descriptionShort: Winnipeg Jets GM Mike Smith addresses potential locker-room tension following Fredrik Olausson's contract dispute and attempted return to Sweden.
descriptionLong: Winnipeg Jets GM Mike Smith responded to brewing conflict within the team following Swedish player Fredrik Olausson's attempt to void his NHL contract and return to Färjestad in Sweden. Smith acknowledged that several players harboured resentment toward Olausson for allegedly quitting on the team, but insisted coaching staff would manage the situation. The article also covers prospects like centre McLlwain from North Bay, who impressed in camp with two goals and expressed determination to prove his value after limited ice time in Pittsburgh.

attribution.headline: Team unity goal for Jets despite Olausson tensions
